mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql002 */ A.CUSTOMER_ID CUSTOMER_CODE ,A.CONTENTS IFA_MEMO_CONTENT ,A.UPDATE_TIME IFA_MEMO_UPDATE_DATE_TIME FROM MEDIATE_MEMO A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode}
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql004 */ A.CCS_CONTENTS CCS_MEMO FROM CCS_CUSTOMER_MEMO A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode}
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql005 */ A.COURSE_NAME CUSTOMER_INFO_COURSE FROM DEALER_COURSE_MASTER A WHERE A.DEALER_NUMBER = #{req.dealerNumber}
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql003Select */ A.CUSTOMER_ID CUSTOMER_CODE FROM MEDIATE_MEMO A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql003Select */ A.CUSTOMER_ID CUSTOMER_CODE FROM MEDIATE_MEMO A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode} AND UPDATE_TIME = TO_DATE(#{req.ifaMemoUpdateDateTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#SqlStb */ A.* , B.MARGIN_POWER_INFO_YEN_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_MSG , B.MARGIN_POWER_INFO_YEN_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_ERROR_LEVEL , B.FOREIGN_TRADE_ACCOUNT_OPEN_STATUS_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_MSG , B.FOREIGN_TRADE_ACCOUNT_OPEN_STATUS_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_ERROR_LEVEL , B.BUY_RESERVE_POWER_INFO_FOREIGN_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_MSG , B.BUY_RESERVE_POWER_INFO_FOREIGN_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_ERROR_LEVEL , B.US_STOCK_MARGIN_ACCOUNT_OPEN_STATUS_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_MSG , B.US_STOCK_MARGIN_ACCOUNT_OPEN_STATUS_ACQUIRE_FAILURE_ERROR_LEVEL FROM TEST_CUSTOMER_CACHE A LEFT JOIN TEST_CUSTOMER_CACHE_ERROR_LIST B ON A.CUSTOMER_CODE = B.CUSTOMER_CODE WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND TO_NUMBER(A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql007 */ A.NAME_KANA, A.ZIP_CODE, A.ADDRESS_KANJI1, A.ADDRESS_KANA1, A.SEX_KBN FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql008 */ TRIM(A.UAI_OCCUPATION) AS UAI_OCCUPATION, A.UAI_OFFICE_NAME, A.UAI_OFFICE_PHONE_LONG_DIST, A.UAI_OFFICE_PHONE_CITY_CODE, A.UAI_OFFICE_PHONE_NUMBER, A.UAI_OFFICE_DAIHYO_KBN, A.UAI_CORP_SETTLEMENT_TERM1, A.UAI_CORP_SETTLEMENT_TERM2, A.OPEN_ACCT_DATE AS UAI_OPEN_ACCT_DATE, A.UAI_JNISA_SEIGEN_SHURYO_YMD FROM CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID+SUB0202_00-02#Sql009 */ A.VISIBLE_BUTEN_CODE, (CASE A.ID_PW_FLG WHEN '0' THEN 'IDあり/取引PWあり' WHEN '1' THEN 'IDあり/取引PWなし' WHEN '2' THEN 'IDなし/取引PWなし' ELSE '' END) AS ID_PW_FLG, A.EMP_CR_CD, A.EMP_CS_CD, B.SDM_NAME AS EMP_CR_NAME, C.SDM_NAME AS EMP_CS_NAME
FROM ETINTRA.SUB_DEALER_CODE_RELATION A LEFT OUTER JOIN ETRADE.SUB_DEALER_MEMBER@CORDYS_ET10.WORLD B ON B.SDM_BROKER_CODE = '0000' AND A.EMP_CR_CD = B.SDM_CODE AND B.SDM_TYPE = '3' AND B.SDM_DELETE_FLG = '0' LEFT OUTER JOIN ETRADE.SUB_DEALER_MEMBER@CORDYS_ET10.WORLD C ON A.BROKER_CODE = C.SDM_BROKER_CODE AND A.EMP_CS_CD = C.SDM_CODE AND C.SDM_TYPE = '1' AND C.SDM_DELETE_FLG = '0' WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{req.accountNumber}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_00-02#Sql010 */ A.USER_NAME, A.COMMISSION_ID, A.NEW_COMMISSION_ID, TO_CHAR(A.NEW_COMMISSION_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS NEW_COMMISSION_DATE FROM CALLCENTER.WEB_USER_NAME A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode}
SELECT TENGUN_ID FROM CORDYS.BUTEN_TENGUN_INFO WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode}
